message: No active service locations are configured.
whyItMatters: Every encounter must reference a service facility location. Without at least one, claims cannot be assembled.
resolution: Add at least one active service location on the Service Locations settings page.

message: There is not exactly one default service location.
whyItMatters: Without a single default location, new encounters cannot auto-populate the place of service, leading to inconsistent claims.
resolution: Mark exactly one service location as the default on the Service Locations settings page.

message: One or more active service locations are missing a complete address.
whyItMatters: Service facility addresses are required on the 837P (loop 2310C). Missing or malformed addresses cause rejections.
resolution: Provide line 1, city, two-letter state, and a valid 5- or 9-digit ZIP for each location listed in evidence.

message: One or more service locations have an invalid Place of Service code.
whyItMatters: Place of Service codes are CMS-defined values. Invalid codes cause payer rejections at the claim line level.
resolution: Choose a CMS Place of Service code (e.g. 02, 10, 11, 21, 22) for each location listed in evidence.

message: One or more service location NPIs fail the Luhn check digit validation.
whyItMatters: An invalid facility NPI on the 2310C loop will reject the claim.
resolution: Correct the NPI for each location listed in evidence. Leave blank if the location does not bill under its own NPI.
